# Truzot AI Headshots

> Truzot is an AI-powered professional headshot generator that creates studio-quality corporate, LinkedIn, and executive headshots from casual selfies in minutes.

## About Truzot
Truzot democratizes professional branding by replacing expensive photography studio sessions with advanced generative AI. Users upload 1-5 selfies, and the platform trains a custom LoRA model to generate 40-200 high-resolution headshots across various styles, backgrounds, and attire.

## Core Features
- **AI Model Training**: Custom LoRA model trained on user's facial features.
- **Style Variety**: 6+ categories including Corporate, LinkedIn, Creative, Casual, Startup, and Real Estate.
- **Fast Delivery**: Headshots generated in 10 minutes to 2 hours.
- **Privacy First**: Photos are encrypted and automatically deleted after 30 days.
- **Commercial Rights**: Full commercial usage rights included for all generated images.

## Pricing Plans
- **Basic Shoot**: $29 | 40 HD Headshots | 10+ Styles | 2-hour delivery
- **Professional Shoot**: $39 | 100 Premium 4K Headshots | 30+ Styles | 1-hour delivery
- **Executive Shoot**: $59 | 200 Ultra 8K Headshots | All Styles | 30-minute priority delivery

## Target Audience
- Job seekers and LinkedIn professionals
- Corporate teams and HR departments
- Real estate agents and sales professionals
- Startup founders and executives
- Actors and creatives

## How It Works
1. Upload 1-5 casual selfies (phone photos work best).
2. Customize preferences (eye color, clothing, background, framing).
3. Choose a plan and complete secure checkout via Stripe.
4. Receive an email with a link to download your AI-generated headshots.
